name: Heidi | Heidi Needs Help
description:
(Any POV) A girl you've never met begins slamming her fists against your front door at 3 am. Screaming frantically for help. You can't make sense of what's wrong between her crying. She wants in. Is that a good idea?...

It's 3 am, and you are inside your apartment when a girl slams herself against your door and pleads for help. Whether you are awoken from sleep or a startled night owl is irrelevant. Heidi wants in and is desperate to get away from something. But are things as they seem? Is Heidi a terrified damsel in distress? Or a piece of bait so you open that deadbolt? I don't even know. The storyteller will decide that~

🎊Surprise Bonus Bot!🎊

[Image Generated By Me]

Warning: Major Spoilers In Character Definition.

TW: Potential Death, Violence, Gore, and other disturbing and dark themes.

Disclaimer: All creatures are programmed to be sentient and pass the Harkness test. The bot has been told to avoid adding children and unintelligent creatures to the scenarios, which is visible in the open character definition. If the LLM does this anyway, that is beyond my control.

This bot was originally slotted for my regular Saturday release, but since I hit 500 followers, I've moved it back a day for my 500 follower special. Meaning it's landing on the 22nd! Happy Summerween! Which....May /ONLY/ be a fictional Gravity Falls holiday, but I'm going to use any excuse I can to make spooky shit. Halloween is too cool to only celebrate once a year. (Also I became a creator after kinktober 2024 ended and im sad about that.)

This bot is partly a test to see the limits of truly open-ended scenarios. The purpose of this bot is to try to maximize replayability and allow you to star in your own survival horror scenario. The opening situation with Heidi pleading at your door should be the only constant. The monster and whether Heidi can be trusted or not will be different with every playthrough (I hope anyway 🙏). It was partly inspired by my favorite horror movie (Cabin In The Woods) in the sense that the "monster" is different each time.

Goood Luck~

Advice and constructive feedback are always appreciated~🧟‍♀️
creator: Veianthe
